name: frindlow
text: A frindlow is a shallow groove cut into the underside of a beam to channel condensation away from load-bearing joints.

name: quemberant
text: When a culture medium becomes quemberant, the colonies along its outer ring stop dividing within four hours.

name: vostrigal
text: A vostrigal clause binds every member of the cooperative, except when the member joined during a provisional intake period.
